job_title: Sr. Machine Learning Engineer, Autonomous Driving & Parking
job_nlp_title: Sr. Machine Learning Engineer, Autonomous Driving & Parking
taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Machine Learning, Machine Learning Engineer
core_skills: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Python, PyTorch, TensorFlow
skill_match_scores: Machine Learning:1.0, Deep Learning:1.0, Python:1.0, PyTorch:0.0, TensorFlow:0.0
must_have_quals: Master's or Ph.D. in Computer Science, Robotics, Machine Learning, or a related field, Expert-level proficiency in Python and ML libraries such as PyTorch or TensorFlow, Solid understanding of state-of-the-art ML techniques and DL architectures (e.g. transformers), and their application to ADAS perception and planning stacks, Proven experience building reliable production systems with large-scale architecture, evaluation pipelines, scalable and efficient deep learning models, and performance metrics, Proficiency in C++ and strong hands-on experience with software engineering design principles, Background in at least one of the following is a must: perception, prediction or planning in ADAS, environment modeling, autonomous vehicles or robotic applications
preferred_quals: 3+ years of experience in ML development, particularly in large-scale data and real-time systems, Experience working with foundational models, large language models (LLMs), or end-to-end AV planning systems, Experience porting ML models to embedded platforms, with strong C++ fundamentals
core_responsibilities: Design, develop, and evaluate cutting-edge machine learning architectures for autonomous driving, focusing on actor prediction, behavior modeling, and motion planning, Lead software development initiatives by applying deep learning architecture expertise to deploy robust planning systems in real-world environments, Lead the design for reusable, high-performance, low-latency and high-reliability behavior and motion planning software architectures for Level 2/3/4 autonomous driving and parking systems, Conduct research into state-of-the-art ML planning and prediction techniques and bring these innovations into production systems, Stay current with academic and industry advancements in planning and prediction, integrating promising methodologies into Lucid’s ADAS stack, Write high-quality, automotive-grade software compliant with industry standards for safety and quality, Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure seamless implementation and deployment of autonomous driving and parking features
job_summary: Lucid Motors is leading the future in luxury electric vehicles and is seeking a Sr. Machine Learning Engineer specializing in Autonomous Driving & Parking. The role involves designing and developing cutting-edge machine learning architectures for autonomous driving, leading software development initiatives, and collaborating cross-functionally to implement autonomous features.
